annual_rate.notes: Prejudgment interest under N.D.C.C. § 32-03-04 — 6% (simple interest). This is PREjudgment interest (accruing before entry of judgment) and is separate from North Dakota’s post-judgment rate; availability is limited by claim type (see the page). Verify against the statute text. Not legal advice.
